pi_items.source: task.json description, setup_task.sh, export_result.sh - consistent across all task files
setup_task.sh (lines 26-31), setup_openice.sh (line 31), export_result.sh (line 14) - cloned from https://github.com/mdpnp/mdpnp.git
task.json description states 'must list at least 4 distinct manufacturers'
GitHub API query to https://api.github.com/repos/mdpnp/mdpnp/contents/devices - verified October 2025

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real, public OpenICE medical device interoperability platform from the MD PnP program (https://github.com/mdpnp/mdpnp). The source code is located at /opt/openice/mdpnp and contains device drivers from 12 real manufacturers: Philips, Masimo, Dräger, Nellcor, Nonin, Oridion, CPC, Fluke, GE Healthcare, Mindray, Covidien, and Puritan Bennett. The task requires agents to explore the source code directory and create a report listing at least 4 manufacturers at /home/ga/Desktop/device_driver_audit.txt. The metadata's 'known_manufacturers' list contains two errors: it includes 'ivy' (which does not exist in the repository) and 'orion' (which should be 'oridion').
